uplink.description: Status report, no vibration on either gang (upstream example input)
uplink._note: Upstream Status report input (status1=0, status2=0). Battery byte 30 (0x1e) => 3.0 V, no low-battery flag. Both gangs idle -> motion not detected, count 0. expected.data authored here from reference/upstream-codec.js wire semantics, NOT copied from upstream normalizeUplink.
status1=1 (gang 1 vibration), status2=0. One channel active -> detected true, count 1.

uplink.description: Synthetic: both gangs detecting vibration, low battery flagged
uplink._note: Battery byte 158 (0x9e): high bit 0x80 set -> lowBattery true; lower 7 bits 0x1e=30 => 3.0 V. status1=1, status2=1 -> both gangs active, count 2.

uplink.description: Startup/device-info frame carries no measurement (upstream example input)
uplink._note: reportType byte 0x00 is the SW/HW version + datecode startup frame; no measurement, reported as an error.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 carries no measurement
uplink._note: fPort 7 is config request/response (ConfigReportRsp); not a data report.
